title: OpenStax Algebra and Trigonometry 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Algebra and Trigonometry 2e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Algebra and Trigonometry 2e covers functions, equations, polynomials, exponentials, logarithms, trigonometry, systems, sequences, and analytic geometry.
Use this source for worked examples, vocabulary, review reading, and extra practice when students need math text that can feed the adaptation pipeline.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
